Bibliography

Vignette Bibliography

Model Library

Model library

Exact, Modal-Series, and T-Matrix Families

SPHMS
SPHMS implementation
Spherical modal series solution (SPHMS) theory
FCMS
FCMS implementation
Finite cylinder modal series solution (FCMS) theory
PSMS
PSMS implementation
Prolate spheroidal modal series solution (PSMS) theory
TMM
TMM implementation
TMM theory
SOEMS
Target strength for a calibration sphere
Target strength for a calibration sphere
ESSMS
Elastic-shelled sphere implementation
Elastic-shelled sphere modal series (ESSMS) theory
BCMS
Bent cylinder modal series solution
Bent cylinder modal series solution
ECMS
Elastic cylinder modal series solution
Elastic cylinder modal series solution

Approximation and Composite Families

DWBA
DWBA implementation
Distorted wave Born approximation (DWBA) theory
SDWBA
SDWBA implementation
Stochastic distorted wave Born approximation (SDWBA) theory
KRM
KRM implementation
Kirchhoff-Ray Mode (KRM) theory
HPA
HPA implementation
High-pass approximation (HPA) theory
TRCM
TRCM implementation
Two-ray cylinder model (TRCM) theory
PCDWBA
Phase-compensated distorted wave Born approximation
Phase-compensated distorted wave Born approximation
VESM
Viscous-elastic spherical scattering model
Viscous-elastic spherical scattering model
BBFM
Body-backbone fish model
Body-backbone fish model
